sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
வினைச்சொல் - படவில் போ, ஒடு, யாத்திரைபண்ணு, போ
float, flow to sail, navigate, travel by ship

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: The first is another form for the second which is used as an alternate in certain tenses; probably a form of G4150 (through the idea of plunging through the water); to pass in a vessel: - sail. See also G4130.
